creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/news/newsflash/#2021-01-25:1>: 

> Website and Documentation converted to Hugo and AsciiDoctor

If I understand correctly, EPUB® was not a focus area around the time of transition. 

Realistically: I don't foresee anyone spearheading what's necessary to reimplement conversions to EPUB, in the near future. With some reluctance, I'll close this report. Keyword: 

* feature

– and reduction in severity, to the norm for a feature request.
